# customer-support-bot-mcp

> Minimal MCP server for Rocket.Chat generated by rc-mcp.

**Generated by [rc-mcp](https://github.com/thekishandev/MCP-Server-Generator)** — Minimal MCP Server Generator for Rocket.Chat.

## Tools (8)

| Tool | Method | Endpoint | Description |
|------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `livechat_visitor` | POST | `/api/v1/livechat/visitor` | Register Livechat Visitor |
| `livechat_room_forward` | POST | `/api/v1/livechat/room.forward` | Forward Omnichannel Room |
| `livechat_visitor_department_transfer` | POST | `/api/v1/livechat/visitor/department.transfer` | Visitor Transfer Room |
| `cannedresponses_get` | GET | `/api/v1/canned-responses.get` | Get User Canned Responses |
| `chat_postMessage` | POST | `/api/v1/chat.postMessage` | Post Message |
| `livechat_department_autocomplete` | GET | `/api/v1/livechat/department.autocomplete` | Autocomplete Department |
| `livechat_agent_info_rid_token` | GET | `/api/v1/livechat/agent.info/{rid}/{token}` | Get Agent Information |
| `login` | POST | `/api/v1/login` | Login with Username and Password |

## Quick Start

### 1. Install dependencies

\`\`\`bash
npm install
\`\`\`

### 2. Configure environment

\`\`\`bash
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your Rocket.Chat credentials
\`\`\`

### 3. Build and run

\`\`\`bash
npm run build
npm start
\`\`\`

### 4. Use with gemini-cli

Add to your \`settings.json\`:

\`\`\`json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "customer-support-bot-mcp": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./dist/server.js"],
      "env": {
        "RC_URL": "http://localhost:3000",
        "RC_USER": "your-user",
        "RC_PASSWORD": "your-password"
      }
    }
  }
}
\`\`\`

## Development

\`\`\`bash
# Run in development mode (no build step)
npm run dev

# Run tests
npm test
\`\`\`
